name: feat-ESE-0015-04
title: Multi-camera render loop
description: Update the render loop to support multiple cameras per frame. Instead of a single endFrame() render call, iterate over cameras in dependency order (from buildRenderOrder), setting the render target and active camera for each pass. Integrate with the view sync system so syncWorldTree tracks camera renderTargets and RenderQuad texture bindings.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Render loop iterates over cameras from buildRenderOrder
- Each camera's renderTarget is set before rendering (texture or browser)
- RenderQuad objects have their material texture bound after their source camera renders
- Multiple cameras produce multiple render passes per frame
- Existing single-camera behavior unchanged (backward compatible)
- Unit tested with tracking renderer
demoDeliverable: Terminal output from unit tests showing multi-camera render passes in correct dependency order.
testingScenarios:
- Single camera (existing behavior): one render pass per frame
- Two cameras with different targets: two render passes in correct order
- Camera renders to texture, quad displays it: texture bound before parent camera renders
- Browser camera renders last
stakeholderUnderstanding: Traversing the dependency tree and iterating for recursive cases. Required before actually doing the rendering.
